Intraday post (20/Oct)

Window of risk:

Window of Risk, Disbalance - Investigating the story that the market tells

Weekly post:

VIX expo, CPI - Weekly post (20-24/Oct)

Let’s look at the daily Galton-board…

INTRADAY POSTCoding today’s positioning:

The net speed profile is flat to negative, with some local steep gamma bar at 6745.The centroid of the profile is at 6735.95 (but 6710.24 is a margin of error now).There is a little but more freeway up (to 6750) than down, bit it is insignificant.The centroid is very much strong pivot today, especially after 2PM, it looks like a line in the sand, but it will be hard to break from either way (i mean, significantly low probability to break it).

Downside pivot is at 6651.85the downside speed is flat. And from this point, the primal downside target is 6617.45, and secondary is the 6590 zone.If vol would spike, we could see 6550 as daily max, but then reversion back up towards 6590, then maybe a pin to 6570.

Upside pivot is at 6743.29, from where a squeeze towards 6765/70 would be possible then revert back and pin to the pivot, but it has low probability.

The net gamma is negative, color (gamma decay) is also net negative. There is more room to go down than up today. Market seems only to have a chance to go up if it opens above the centroid. But then, the most probabile target is the upside pivot. To the downside however, there is multiple possible ways, but given the flat speed exposure, it would be rather a grind than a downstick, especially due to the 6680 local gamma.Thats a supportive point, locally, but only below 6698 and above the downside pivot.

The distribution is almost symmetrical, tails are very thin. Kurtosis is set to be sold. I wouldn’t force intraday trade today. No clear picture.(Especially not after last week gains)

OptionsDepth Heatmap
